{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Silver
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver]] is a voice or entity that communicates with [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
